Refund requests must be submitted within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, refunds are no longer available. To request a refund, contact our support team with your order number.
Order cancellations are only possible within 30 minutes of placing the order. If your order has already shipped, you will need to refuse delivery or initiate a return once received.
Shipping typically takes 3-5 business days for standard delivery within the continental US. Express shipping (1-2 business days) is available at checkout for an additional fee.
Premium support is available for enterprise customers and includes priority response times of 2 hours on weekdays. Standard support has a response time of 24 hours.
Account verification requires a valid email address and phone number. You can update your account details in the Settings section after logging in.
All orders come with a 14-day returns policy for items in original condition with tags attached. Return shipping is free if the return is due to product defect.
Payment methods accepted include all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and Apple Pay. We do not currently accept cryptocurrency.
Two-factor authentication is highly recommended for account security. You can enable it in your account security settings to protect against unauthorized access.
International shipping is available to 150+ countries. Import duties and taxes may apply depending on your location and should be calculated at checkout.
Product warranties vary by item. Electronics come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Clothing and accessories have a 6-month defect warranty.
For billing inquiries, please provide your invoice number which can be found in your order confirmation email. We can help with duplicate charges, refunds, or payment adjustments.
Lost or damaged shipments should be reported within 7 days of the expected delivery date. We will investigate and either resend the item or process a refund.
Bulk orders (10+ items) receive a 10% discount. Contact our B2B team at business@company.com for enterprise pricing and custom arrangements.
Password reset can be done through the login page by clicking 'Forgot Password'. A reset link will be sent to your registered email address and is valid for 24 hours.
Subscription cancellations take effect at the end of your current billing cycle. You will continue to have access until then, and no additional charges will apply.
Customer complaints about product quality or service are taken seriously. We offer full refunds or replacements for defective items within the return window.
Chat support is available Monday-Friday 9AM-6PM EST. For urgent issues outside these hours, you can submit a support ticket and we'll respond within 24 hours.
Price matching is available within 14 days of purchase if you find the same item cheaper elsewhere. Submit proof of the lower price with your order number.
Gift cards are available in denominations from $25 to $500 and do not expire. They can be redeemed online during checkout or in-store if applicable.
Loyalty program members earn 1 point per dollar spent and can redeem 100 points for a $10 discount. New members get 50 bonus points on signup.
Store pickup orders are usually ready within 2 hours for in-stock items. You will receive a confirmation email when your order is ready to collect.
If your package is marked delivered but you have not received it, please wait 24 hours and then contact support so we can investigate with the carrier.
Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled before the billing date. You can manage renewal settings from your account billing page.
Damaged items should be reported within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the packaging and product so we can process a replacement quickly.
Refunds are returned to the original payment method and may take 5-10 business days to appear depending on your bank or card provider.
Customers can change their shipping address only before an order enters the packing stage. After that, address changes are not guaranteed.
Warranty claims require the original receipt and a description of the defect. We may ask for photos or a short video before approving the claim.
Support tickets are prioritized by urgency. Billing failures, account lockouts, and failed deliveries are handled before general questions.
Bulk buyers can request invoices with net-30 payment terms after account approval. Approval requires company details and a valid business email.
Seasonal promotions cannot be combined with loyalty points unless the offer explicitly says otherwise. Only one discount code can be used per order.
